series_metadata.series_description: Printed copies of quarterly reports prepared by a third-party vendor that contain information and analysis on the financial safety and stability of financial institutions approved by the Ohio Board of Deposit to hold public funds. This record series may also contain summary reports and other work papers that document the review of these reports for compliance purposes.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: conclusion of current fiscal year, and 1 additional fiscal year. ; Paper: conclusion of current fiscal year, and 1 additional fiscal year
